library.note: Currently Hebrew, single merged version per text. English translations and multiple manuscript versions are NOT yet included (planned via Sefaria-Export, see build/README).

siddurSefardEnglish.englishVersion: Translation based on the Metsudah linear siddur, by Avrohom Davis, 1981
siddurSefardEnglish.note: Daily tefillah (Shacharis/Mincha/Maariv/Krias Shema/Kabbalas Shabbos) fully translated; some supplementary sections (bris milah, Kiddush Levanah, occasional brachos, Lag BaOmer piyutim) are Hebrew-only where Sefaria has no translation for that section.

otzaria.note: Optional full-app reader with instant full-text search. The platform also runs with no app at all via the browser reader.
